definitions: A path or track, often unpaved, that is located on private property and is not accessible to the general public without permission.
A designated route for walking, hiking, or other activities that is maintained by a private entity or individual for exclusive use.
examples: The landowner clearly marked the entrance to the private trail.
Hikers must obtain a permit to use the private trail.
The private trail offered stunning views of the valley.
Maintenance of the private trail is the responsibility of the property owner.
